title: poa angustifolia var. cinerea
intro: Poa angustifolia var. cinerea, also known as cinereous bluegrass, is a variety of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of cinereous bluegrass include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to support immune function and promote overall well-being. Cinereous bluegrass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate congestion.
